domain: agent reliability architecture orchestration wave simplicio-loop
neural_result: Existing Simplicio decisions require deterministic Runtime-first execution, one isolated issue slot, Loop-consumable typed signals, receipts, and no local LLM; current Agent already has closed-loop anti-oscillation primitives to extend.
note: Implement a pure guard module and focused tests; integration remains bounded to an explicit caller API so it does not create a second scheduler or bypass Runtime gates.
